detail.description: Mickey Gasper singles on a ground ball to shortstop Andrés Giménez.
Mickey Gasper hits a ground-rule double (5) on a line drive down the right-field line.
Mickey Gasper singles on a ground ball to right fielder Ezequiel Duran. Isiah Kiner-Falefa scores. Marcelo Mayer to 2nd.
Mickey Gasper doubles (4) on a fly ball to center fielder Wyatt Langford.
Mickey Gasper triples (1) on a fly ball to right fielder Tyler O'Neill. Willson Contreras scores. Masataka Yoshida scores.
Mickey Gasper singles on a line drive to right fielder Tyler O'Neill.
Mickey Gasper singles on a ground ball to center fielder Michael Harris II.
Mickey Gasper singles on a line drive to center fielder Michael Harris II.
Mickey Gasper singles on a line drive to center fielder Byron Buxton.
Mickey Gasper singles on a fly ball to center fielder Justin Crawford.
Mickey Gasper singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Adolis García.
Mickey Gasper doubles (2) on a fly ball to left fielder Chandler Simpson.
Mickey Gasper singles on a ground ball to right fielder Jonny DeLuca. Trevor Story scores.
Mickey Gasper doubles (1) on a line drive to center fielder Cedric Mullins.
Mickey Gasper singles on a ground ball to right fielder Jac Caglianone. Nick Sogard out at home on the throw, right fielder Jac Caglianone to catcher Carter Jensen. Isiah Kiner-Falefa to 3rd.
Mickey Gasper singles on a ground ball to right fielder Jac Caglianone, deflected by first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino. Nick Sogard to 3rd.
Mickey Gasper singles on a line drive to left fielder Isaac Collins.
Mickey Gasper singles on a ground ball to center fielder Stuart Fairchild.
Mickey Gasper singles on a ground ball to right fielder Chase DeLauter.
Mickey Gasper doubles (3) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Daniel Schneemann, deflected by right fielder Chase DeLauter.
Mickey Gasper singles on a line drive to right fielder José Azócar.
Mickey Gasper singles on a ground ball to left fielder Mauricio Dubón. Carlos Narváez scores.
Mickey Gasper singles on a ground ball to right fielder José Azócar.
Mickey Gasper singles on a line drive to center fielder Cedric Mullins. Willson Contreras to 2nd.
Mickey Gasper singles on a line drive to right fielder Luke Raley.
Mickey Gasper singles on a ground ball to right fielder José Caballero.
